description: Ingest ONE source — a web URL or raw text — into a notebook (POST /api/sources).
rules: remote-mutating: creates a source resource on the live server
SOURCE_URL takes precedence over SOURCE_TEXT when both are set; URL sources processed synchronously
writes the created source JSON to record_store/source.json
degrades gracefully (status=unreachable, exit 0) when the server is down
usage: Set OPEN_NOTEBOOK_URL, NOTEBOOK_ID, and one of SOURCE_URL or SOURCE_TEXT (SOURCE_TITLE optional for text). Output: source.json.
limitation: Requires a reachable Open Notebook server. File uploads (PDF/audio/video) are not exposed by this perk — only URL and text ingestion. Full processing needs a configured AI provider.
